name: Purple Passion
recipeIngredient: 3 Cans of cold water, thawed Juice
Purple grapes and mint leaves for garnish (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the grapes, ice, and mint leaves in a pitcher.
2. Stir until the sugar is dissolved. Cover and chill.
3. Serve over ice and garnish with grapes and mint leaves if desired.
